about.story_text: Bongo Dispensary is dedicated to providing the highest quality medical and recreational cannabis products to the Doylestown community. Locally owned and operated, we focus on friendly service and expert guidance to help our customers find the right products for their needs. Our commitment to compliance and education ensures every visit is safe and informative.
about.founder_note: As passionate advocates for cannabis wellness, we strive to create a welcoming environment where every customer feels respected and supported. Your health and satisfaction are our top priorities.
